title: describeNode() request
description: Arguments to the engine's primary entry point. The Anthropic API key is passed alongside, never embedded in this payload — secrets do not belong in the same blob as cacheable inputs.

mode.description: Selects the primary mode (or 'topic' for a deep-dive follow-up). See modes.md.

topic.description: REQUIRED when mode === 'topic'. MUST be omitted (or null) otherwise. See topics.md.

node.description: REQUIRED for overview / screen / element. OPTIONAL for screenshot. OPTIONAL for topic (the LRU lookup uses node.id when supplied; for screenshot+topic flows the host typically passes a stub node with id = sha256 of the PNG).

imagePNGBase64.description: Base64-encoded PNG bytes (no data: prefix). REQUIRED for screenshot mode. OPTIONAL for the other primary modes (the prompt falls back to a no-image sentinel). Ignored for topic mode (the image is already in the conversation history). MUST be ≤ 5,000,000 characters; over-cap images MUST be downsampled or dropped by the caller before reaching the engine.

context.description: OPTIONAL single-line caller context inserted into the SCREENSHOT template (e.g. 'Captured from Slack, channel #design-review'). Ignored by other modes.
